messages.content: We sincerely thank all reviewers for their insightful feedback! We are encouraged by the consensus on the \textbf{novelty and significance} (\textbf{\Rone, \Rtwo, \Rthree}), specifically recognizing our work as the \textbf{first} to systematically formalize \textbf{visual knowledge}. Reviewers appreciated our \textbf{carefully designed benchmark} (\textbf{\Rone, \Rthree}) and our \textbf{interesting and effective}  method (\textbf{\Rone, \Rthree}). We will address the concerns below.  哪里能删一个词或换，避免断行

可以从不太“承载信息”的位置删/换词，优先不动关键卖点（novelty/significance/first/benchmark/method）。下面给你几个最容易省字、且不伤语义的改法（任选其一或组合），一般就能避免断行：

### 1) 删掉 “sincerely”
- 原：*We sincerely thank all reviewers for their insightful feedback!*
- 改：*We thank all reviewers for their insightful feedback!*

### 2) 删掉 “the” 或简化 “consensus on”
- 原：*We are encouraged by the consensus on the \textbf{novelty and significance} ...*
- 改：*We are encouraged by consensus on \textbf{novelty and significance} ...*  
或  
- 改：*We are encouraged by the strong consensus on \textbf{novelty and significance} ...*（有时 strong 比 the consensus on 更短，取决于你后面怎么接）

### 3) “specifically recognizing” 换成更短的 “noting / recognizing”
- 原：*..., specifically recognizing our work as the \textbf{first} to ...*
- 改：*..., recognizing our work as the \textbf{first} to ...*  
或更短：*..., noting our work as the \textbf{first} to ...*

### 4) “carefully designed” 精简
- 原：*our \textbf{carefully designed benchmark}*
- 改：*our \textbf{well-designed benchmark}*（通常更短）  
或直接：*our \textbf{benchmark}*（如果不太需要强调）

### 5) “interesting and effective” 删一个形容词
- 原：*our \textbf{interesting and effective} method*
- 改：*our \textbf{effective} method*（最常用也最安全）

如果你愿意贴一下你想避免断行的具体那一行（或告诉我是在两栏排版哪一段断），我可以帮你针对性给出“最小改动”的版本。
